title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
summary: OpenAI与Broadcom联合推出Jalapeño定制AI芯片，专为LLM推理优化，旨在提升性能、效率和规模。
analysis_note: 顶级AI基础设施突破，直接优化LLM推理，技术价值高，但缺乏具体性能数据。
